headlines.title: John Cornyn’s last stand and Democratic fights: What to watch in Texas elections
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary runoffs in Texas will put President Donald Trump’s endorsement to the test again — the latest step in a mission to punish some incumbent Republicans he has deemed insufficiently loyal

headlines.title: South Carolina’s redistricting effort fails in the state Senate with GOP opposition
headlines.description: The Republican-led South Carolina Senate on Tuesday voted against advancing a new congressional map, ending the redistricting effort in the state for now

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: In an interview with NBC News, Vance said he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: Federal court blocks Alabama from using GOP-drawn congressional map
headlines.description: A three-judge panel on Tuesday blocked a Republican-drawn congressional map in Alabama from going into effect, writing that the district lines “intentionally discriminated based on race in violation of the Constitution.”“We cannot see our way clear to requiring Alabamians to cast their votes in the 2026 elections under a districting plan tainted by intentional race-based discrimination,” the panel of federal judges wrote.

headlines.title: Trump says physical exam at Walter Reed went 'perfectly'
headlines.description: President Trump traveled to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center for a physical exam that he said went "perfectly" on his social media account. NBC News' Gabe Gutierrez reports from the White House on the visit and health questions surrounding the president.

headlines.title: Federal court blocks Alabama from using redistricting map
headlines.description: A panel of federal judges blocked Alabama from using a GOP-drawn congressional map that would eliminate one of the state’s majority-Black districts. NBC News’ Gary Grumbach reports on how the case could soon be decided by the Supreme Court.

headlines.title: Trump’s 3rd Doctor Visit in 13 Months Puts Spotlight on His Health
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is heading to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center for what the White house calls “a medical and dental checkup.” It is his third visit in 13 months, putting a fresh spotlight on the president’s health ahead of his 80th birthday in June. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: James Comey’s seashells photo trial delayed until October
headlines.description: Former FBI Director James Comey will go on trial in October over a photo he posted of seashells, provided the Trump administration’s case against him survives forthcoming legal challenges

headlines.title: Supreme Court rejects cop’s bid to toss excessive force claim from a George Floyd protest
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Supreme Court on Tuesday rejected a Michigan police officer’s attempt to evade an excessive force claim arising from an incident that took place during a protest in the aftermath of the George Floyd killing

headlines.title: Supreme Court tosses lawsuit over drivers’ licenses issued to undocumented immigrants
headlines.description: The Supreme Court threw out a long-shot lawsuit in which Florida sought to sue the states of California and Washington for allegedly allowing people who entered the country illegally to obtain commercial truck driver licenses.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.
